title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Naukri.com Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Naukri.com Capital India:
Naukri.com Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com Capital India!
jsonLd.skills: AWS, Node.js, React, Java, TensorFlow, SQL, Agile/Scrum, MongoDB
